Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

Do you answer questions on Yahoo answers?

Philosophy · asked by user [] · 2007-11-05 · 4 answers
hundreds of people enquiring about spiritual life!
user [33] · 2007-11-05
Whats the link, prabhu? Sounds interesting.
user [194] · 2007-11-05
Dear Hari Bhakta dasa,

Bhagavad-Gita,Srimad Bhagavatam and all religious books are questions and answers books!By reading these books,we finally came to know the perfect guide,Srila Prabhupada...and Lord Krsna.
As people dont read so much nowadays-from books,but are in front of their computer screens for hours,its the modern way to preach.You can send them links to Krsna Conscious sites,photos and videos,and live programs from temples!
I preach quite often in forums,and someone,who was going to commit suicide,changed his mind-actually he is a devotee.Needless to say, I was very happy about my presence on the forum.So,anyone can do this,and link others to the Lord.
Just go to http://answers.yahoo.com
And look for spirituality/religion.
user [38] · 2007-11-06
